name: Guru Knowledge Management API
what_it_does: Guru REST API for internal knowledge management and wiki platform. Enables AI agents to create, read, update, and search knowledge cards, manage collections and boards, sync verified content, and integrate Guru's single-source-of-truth into sales, support, and ops workflows. Guru features AI-assisted content suggestions and verification workflows to keep knowledge current.
use_cases: Creating and updating knowledge cards from content management automation agents
Searching verified internal knowledge from AI assistant agents
Syncing knowledge from external systems into Guru collections from integration agents
Managing content verification workflows from knowledge quality agents
not_for: File storage and document management without structured knowledge needs
Simple note-taking without collaborative knowledge management
best_when: A sales, support, or operations team wants AI agents to read verified knowledge, create new cards from discovered information, or sync company knowledge from other systems into Guru.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Internal knowledge bases contain proprietary business information. API credentials provide read and write access to all company knowledge.

auth.notes: Guru uses HTTP Basic auth with user email and API token. API tokens are user-scoped (not app-scoped). Actions performed via API appear as that user's actions.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: up to 3 users; limited features
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter, Builder, and Expert plans scaling users and features; Enterprise available
pricing.notes: Competitive pricing for knowledge management. API access available on all paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per user token; burst limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Internal knowledge base contains proprietary business information
No public MCP server — REST API with user-scoped Basic auth
API actions appear as the user whose token is used — use a dedicated service account
Knowledge cards have verification status — unverified cards may be outdated
US data residency only — verify for international compliance requirements
Rate limits are per user token — service account may need elevated limits
agent_readiness.security_notes: Proprietary internal knowledge. SOC2, GDPR. User-scoped Basic auth tokens — use dedicated service account. US-only data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Proprietary internal knowledge data. SOC2, GDPR. User-scoped tokens — service account recommended. US-only.
